name: Kartaški Front
description: Solo PvE deckbuilder — 4 borbe, permadeath, gradi špil po pobedi

modules.src/main.js: Entry point — inicijalizuje Canvas, wire-uje sve module, pokreće state-machine petlju (turn-based, UI-driven, bez rAF loop-a)
modules.src/config.js: Sve konstante: PLAYER_MAX_HP, energija, HAND_SIZE, starter deck definicije, reward karte, neprijatelji sa intent patternima, boje, reward pool po čvoru
modules.src/state.js: createState() — kompletan state shape (phase, node, deck/hand/discard, player, enemy, stats); saveState(), loadState(), resetState()
modules.src/input.js: Mouse/touch event handleri za karte (.card click), 'Kraj runde' dugme, reward izbor (overlay), game over/victory restart
modules.src/render.js: Canvas rendering: battlefield pozadina, neprijatelj silhueta levo, igrač silhueta desno, HP trake, intent ikona (sword/shield/skull), shield i efekt indikatori
modules.src/ui.js: DOM menadžment: renderHand() kreira .card div-ove, showRewardScreen(), showGameOver(), showVictory(), showMapScreen(), updateToolbar(), showDamageNumber()
modules.src/systems/combat.js: applyCard(state, card) — primeni kartu na state; endPlayerTurn(state); applyEnemyIntent(state) — neprijatelj izvršava intent; checkCombatEnd(state) → 'player_dead'|'enemy_dead'|null
modules.src/systems/effects.js: applyDoT(entity, effectType) — tik efekta; applyEndOfTurnEffects(state, whose) — 'player'|'enemy'; addEffect(entity, name, value, duration); getEffectValue(entity, name) → number
modules.src/systems/deck.js: drawHand(state) — vuče do 5 karata (refill discard→deck ako prazan); shuffleDeck(deck) — Fisher-Yates in-place; addCardToDeck(state, card); discardHand(state)
modules.src/systems/progression.js: nextNode(state) — inkrement node, postavi novog neprijatelja iz CONFIG; getRewardPool(nodeIndex) → array card definicija; calculateScore(state) → hp*10 + dmg/5 + node*50
modules.styles/base.css: Layout: #toolbar (10vh), #battlefield-wrap + canvas (50vh), #hand-zone (40vh) — flexbox kolona, dark paleta #1a1a2e, responsive
modules.styles/ui.css: Karte: .card, .card-attack, .card-block, .card-effect, .card-disabled; reward overlay; game over/victory overlay; toolbar HUD stilovi; dugmad
modules.styles/game.css: Animacije: card hover lift, .card-played fadeOut, .damage-number pop-up float, .flash-red/.flash-green screen flash, .intent-pulse
